# Mystic
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Mystic&prop=wikitext

{{Classbox
| desc = The mystic fights with a staff and uses her crystal orb to bind enemies to a distant plane.
| weaponSlot = Staff
| weapon = Energy Staff
| abilitySlot = Orb
| ability = Statis Orb
| armor = Robe
| armorLink = Robes

| hpStart = 100
| hpLevel = 20 - 30
| hpCap = 670

| mpStart = 100
| mpLevel = 5 - 15
| mpCap = 385

| attStart = 12
| attLevel = 1 - 2
| attCap = 65

| defStart = 0
| defLevel = 0
| defCap = 25

| spdStart = 12
| spdLevel = 0 - 2
| spdCap = 60

| dexStart = 12
| dexLevel = 0 - 2
| dexCap = 65

| vitStart = 15
| vitLevel = 0 - 1
| vitCap = 40

| wisStart = 15
| wisLevel = 1 - 2
| wisCap = 75
}}
